_meta.note: Inter-cluster signal-correlation matrix C for the dependency penalty eff(v)=(Σv)²/(vᵀCv) (plan §2g). These values are seeded from the plan's own worked examples and cluster semantics — they are POSITIVE-DEFINITE (min eigenvalue 0.39) and reproduce the plan examples exactly: A,C confirm -> eff 1.25 (REJECT); B,D confirm -> eff 1.74 (PASS). Replace with the empirically estimated matrix from scripts/b0_audit.py (training-period <=2018 firings) before the WF run; re-estimated at every WF freeze from training data only.
